title: TikTok Video Details Scraper
description: Extract video metadata, author details, engagement metrics, and playback URLs from one or more public TikTok video URLs.

urls.title: TikTok Video URLs
urls.description: One or more TikTok video URLs, photo URLs, short URLs, or numeric video IDs. The actor pushes one dataset item for each requested URL.

url.title: Single TikTok Video URL
url.description: Legacy single URL field for API callers. Ignored when TikTok Video URLs is provided.

hd.title: Request HD Download URL
hd.description: Ask Scrappa to include HD playback fields when upstream data is available.
